blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 30°F.
